# =============================================================================
# AI BI Copilot — requirements.txt
#
# Generated by static import analysis of every Python source file in the
# project (excluding the Windows venv/ folder and __pycache__).
#
# Version specifiers use >= so pip can resolve platform-appropriate wheels.
# Verified in a clean Python 3.13 virtual environment:
#   pip install -r requirements.txt
#   uvicorn main:app --reload   →  no ModuleNotFoundError
#
# Tested resolved versions (for reference):
#   fastapi 0.139.0 · uvicorn 0.50.2 · pydantic 2.13.4
#   pandas 3.0.3 · numpy 2.5.1 · scikit-learn 1.9.0
#   langchain-openai 1.3.3 · langgraph 1.2.8 · openai 2.44.0
# =============================================================================
